requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 for Sierra Leone
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（塞拉利昂）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（獅子山）

summary.en: Sierra Leone's nascent EV charging regulatory framework, coordinated through the Sierra Leone Standards Bureau (SLSB) and EWRC, aligns with IEC standards as the national standards adoption trajectory. Sierra Leone is an IEC affiliate member and SLSB adopts IEC publications as national standards where applicable. For AC EV charging, IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) is the IEC-aligned coupler; for DC fast charging, IEC 62196-3 CCS2 (Combined Charging System Combo 2, configuration FF) is the IEC-aligned standard. There is no established Sierra Leone EV charging infrastructure as of 2026-06-14 with which to confirm mandated connector type from an official government publication; however, any technically credible IEC-aligned deployment in Sierra Leone would follow the Type 2 / CCS2 direction as this is the IEC body of work Sierra Leone is adopting. CHAdeMO is not a reference standard in the SLSB / IEC ecosystem.
summary.zh: 塞拉利昂初期的电动汽车充电监管框架由塞拉利昂标准局（SLSB）和EWRC协调，沿用IEC标准作为国家标准采用路径。塞拉利昂是IEC联系成员，SLSB在适用时将IEC出版物作为国家标准采用。交流充电方面，IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）是IEC体系耦合器；直流快充方面，IEC 62196-3 CCS2（联合充电系统Combo 2，FF配置）是IEC体系标准。截至2026年6月14日，塞拉利昂尚无可从官方政府出版物确认强制接口类型的已建立电动汽车充电基础设施；但任何在塞拉利昂具备技术可信度的IEC体系部署都将遵循Type 2 / CCS2方向，因为这正是塞拉利昂所采用的IEC技术体系。CHAdeMO不属于SLSB / IEC生态系统的参考标准。
summary.zht: 獅子山初期的電動汽車充電監管框架由獅子山標準局（SLSB）和EWRC協調，沿用IEC標準作為國家標準採用路徑。獅子山是IEC聯繫成員，SLSB在適用時將IEC出版物作為國家標準採用。交流充電方面，IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）是IEC體系耦合器；直流快充方面，IEC 62196-3 CCS2（聯合充電系統Combo 2，FF配置）是IEC體系標準。截至2026年6月14日，獅子山尚無可從官方政府出版物確認強制接口類型的已建立電動汽車充電基礎設施；但任何在獅子山具備技術可信度的IEC體系部署都將遵循Type 2 / CCS2方向，因為這正是獅子山所採用的IEC技術體系。CHAdeMO不屬於SLSB / IEC生態系統的參考標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories (Type 2 coupler)
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers (CCS2 / configuration FF)
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
SLSB (Sierra Leone Standards Bureau) — IEC affiliate member, adopts IEC publications as national standards

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack. A GB/T-connector charger cannot be plugged into an IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 vehicle inlet, and no adapter is an accepted substitute.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。GB/T接口充电桩无法插入IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2车辆接口，且任何转接器均不被视为合规替代方案。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。GB/T接口充電樁無法插入IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2車輛接口，且任何轉接器均不被視為合規替代方案。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is physically incompatible with any IEC 62196-aligned EV vehicle in Sierra Leone. Conversion to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) or CCS2 (DC) requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required), labels, test reports, temperature-rise and humidity-endurance evidence. Additionally, for the Sierra Leone 2- and 3-wheeler segment — the most commercially relevant near-term EV type — charger connector standards may differ (often proprietary or basic AC socket-type charging is used); exporters targeting this segment should confirm connector expectations with the vehicle OEM or local importer. Exporters must engage SLSB and EWRC to confirm any connector-type mandate before quoting.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩与塞拉利昂任何IEC 62196体系电动汽车在物理上不兼容。转换为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）或CCS2（直流）需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（在要求时从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告、温升和湿度耐受证据进行硬件重新设计。此外，对于塞拉利昂两轮和三轮电动车细分市场（近期最具商业相关性的电动汽车类型），充电桩接口标准可能有所不同（通常采用专有接口或基本交流插座充电）；针对该细分市场的出口商应向车辆OEM或当地进口商确认接口要求。出口商须在报价前联系SLSB和EWRC以确认是否存在接口类型强制要求。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁與獅子山任何IEC 62196體系電動汽車在物理上不兼容。轉換為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）或CCS2（直流）需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（在要求時從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告、溫升和濕度耐受證據進行硬體重新設計。此外，對於獅子山兩輪和三輪電動車細分市場（近期最具商業相關性的電動汽車類型），充電樁接口標準可能有所不同（通常採用專有接口或基本交流插座充電）；針對該細分市場的出口商應向車輛OEM或當地進口商確認接口要求。出口商須在報價前聯繫SLSB和EWRC以確認是否存在接口類型強制要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 direction is the IEC-aligned expectation for Sierra Leone given SLSB's IEC adoption trajectory; no single official Sierra Leone government publication mandating a specific EVSE connector type could be confirmed as of 2026-06-14; physical incompatibility with GB/T connectors requires hardware redesign for any IEC 62196 deployment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 equivalent; physical incompatibility precludes direct substitution

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Sierra Leone's EV vehicle market is extremely nascent; exporters targeting 2/3-wheelers should separately confirm that vehicle's charging connector type. Confirm any Sierra Leone connector mandate with SLSB and EWRC directly before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从GB/T 20234转换为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。塞拉利昂电动汽车市场处于极早期阶段；针对两轮/三轮车市场的出口商应另行确认该车辆的充电接口类型。在报价或发货前，应直接向SLSB和EWRC确认是否存在塞拉利昂接口强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從GB/T 20234轉換為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。獅子山電動汽車市場處於極早期階段；針對兩輪/三輪車市場的出口商應另行確認該車輛的充電接口類型。在報價或發貨前，應直接向SLSB和EWRC確認是否存在獅子山接口強制要求。
